description: Clothing mesh overlay presets for VRM avatars. Each preset is a separate VRM/GLB file with skinned meshes that attach to the body skeleton.

categories.outerwear: Jackets, coats, capes — overlay on upper body
categories.bottom_overlay: Skirts, loose pants — overlay on lower body with Spring Bone physics
categories.accessory: Hats, bags, belts, glasses — small attachments
